markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff details for new clients Blaxel and Turnstile.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blaxel:** A seed-stage AI infrastructure client with a referral-based VIP relationship. The CEO is committed to a 12-month content investment to build awareness in a new market, overriding a low ICP score.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**Turnstile:** A pre-launch quote-to-cash platform for SMBs, referred by fractional CMO Seema Kumar. The immediate risk is a lack of product knowledge due to minimal client-provided materials.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** The sales handoff process will be improved by securing a clear client review process and time commitment (est. 5–10 hrs/wk) *before* the kickoff call.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** A comprehensive research workflow is being developed to proactively fill knowledge gaps and better prepare the team for client engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)

## Topics

### Blaxel Handoff

  - [**Client:** Blaxel, a seed-stage AI infrastructure company.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**Product:** A platform for running AI agents with instant-booting VMs, secure sandboxes, and usage-based billing.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**Goal:** Build awareness and trust in a new market to preempt future competition.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**Contacts:**](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Nico:** Main POC (engineer/product manager).](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Paul:** CEO (engineer).](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [**ICP Score:** Low (below 13), but approved as an exception due to a VIP referral and the CEO's commitment to a 12-month content investment.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [**Focus:** Top- and mid-funnel awareness content (e.g., "What is an AI agent?").](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [**Exclusions:** Technical content (e.g., engineering blog posts) will be handled by their new technical writer.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [**Risks:**](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [**Review Process:** Potential for delays from two co-founders reviewing in parallel.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [**POC Experience:** Nico has no content marketing background, which may complicate the calibration phase.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Turnstile Handoff

  - [**Client:** Turnstile, a pre-launch quote-to-cash platform for SMBs.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Product:** A unified platform for proposals, billing, collections, and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Goal:** Launch with high content velocity (daily publishing) to support paid campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [**Contacts:**](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Seema Kumar:** Fractional CMO (ex-New Relic).](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
      - [**Matt:** Marketing support, will manage paid campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
      - [**Lillian:** Co-founder with a marketing background.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [**Risks:**](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
      - [**Knowledge Gap:** Minimal client materials provided → team lacks a clear understanding of the product.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**CMS Access:** Blog platform is not yet built; Matt promised it for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
      - [**POC Longevity:** Seema is a fractional CMO; the relationship must be built with the founders to ensure continuity.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [**Problem:** Client review processes and time commitments are often unclear before kickoff, leading to delays.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [**Solution:** Secure a clear review process and time commitment during the sales cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Founders often underestimate the time required for effective collaboration (est. 5–10 hrs/wk).](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
      - [**Tactic:** Set expectations for a time-intensive calibration phase (first 8 weeks) to build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** A comprehensive research workflow is being developed to proactively fill knowledge gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [**Output:** A detailed report on competitors, social perception, and ICP pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Enables the team to engage clients with superior knowledge, even when client materials are limited.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
      - [Run Blaxel and Turnstile kickoff calls.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
      - [Add Hassan to the Blaxel handoff doc.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
      - [Confirm Blaxel's "team at" email access.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [Confirm Turnstile's blog platform timeline with Matt.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [**William & Kirkland:**](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [Develop the new research workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [Contribute questions for the new research workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/ge_LefUeSB72dJC-xz1HC-m8be5-dfEM?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
